description: Artifact-driven 12-hour reflection. The runtime model returns read-only advisory markdown; a deterministic post-processor attests exact primary-object references without treating them as proof that a proposal is correct.
known_gaps: The attestor proves reference integrity, not evidentiary relevance or causal entailment; promotion remains a synthesis and decision responsibility.
Live transcript-scale and long-window performance are covered by runtime telemetry rather than the compact golden fixtures.
